summary: The diff implements a comprehensive group banking app with member management, installment tracking, admin panel, bilingual UI (Hindi/English), and payment QR code integration. The implementation covers most requirements with strong backend authorization and frontend React components. Profile photo management is partially implemented. Some details require verification regarding the 26-member limit enforcement and payment QR image asset.

missing_requirements.requirement: Profile photo upload/management functionality for members
missing_requirements.reason: Member type includes profilePhoto field, but no evidence of UI components or backend methods for uploading/updating profile photos is shown in the diff. Only default avatar placeholders are referenced.
The diff shows UI displaying members count out of 26 but no backend validation preventing addition of a 27th member is evident in the truncated addMember function.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display of current balance on member detail page
missing_requirements.reason: The requirement specifies showing current balance but getMemberBalance query exists without clear evidence that it calculates and displays a balance. The MemberDetail page component is not shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Login validation using mobile number and password logic
missing_requirements.reason: No backend authentication logic is shown that validates mobile number as username and last 4 digits as password. The system uses Internet Identity blockchain-based auth instead of the specified mobile/password scheme.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display of recent payments in admin summary
missing_requirements.reason: SummaryStats component shows totalMembers and totalAmountCollected, but recent payments or recent activity display is not evident in the truncated diff.

hallucinated_features.reason: The app implements Internet Identity ICP blockchain auth instead of the specified mobile number plus password authentication. REQ-4 explicitly requires login via 10-digit mobile number with last 4 digits as password.
The diff includes ThemeProvider with dark mode toggle capability, but REQ-8 only specifies a cohesive visual design theme with no mention of dark mode functionality.
Backend includes comprehensive blob storage functionality which is not requested in any requirement. Profile photos are mentioned but not blob storage infrastructure.
Backend implements MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules with permission-based access beyond the simple admin vs regular member distinction specified in requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Caffeine.ai attribution footer with UTM tracking
hallucinated_features.reason: Footer includes branding and tracking links for caffeine.ai which is not part of any requirement. This appears to be tooling attribution rather than requested functionality.
